# CODEX Tech Innovations LLM Access File
# Last Updated: 2024-01-15
# Contact: info@codextechinnovations.com

# Allowed Agents: GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended

> CODEX Tech Innovations & Consultants LLP is a Bengaluru-based software development agency specializing in mobile applications, web platforms, and SaaS solutions for the hospitality, real estate, and healthcare sectors. Established in 2018, the company has delivered 150+ projects with fixed-price contracts and 6-month warranties.

## Core Services
- **Mobile App Development**: Native iOS/Android and cross-platform solutions using React Native and Flutter
- **Web Development**: Full-stack applications with React, Node.js, and cloud infrastructure
- **SaaS Development**: Subscription-based software including PG Management Systems, Hotel PMS, and Hospital Management Systems
- **Compliance Solutions**: Regulatory software for Indian business standards

## Products
- **PG Management System**: Tenant management, rent collection, and facility maintenance software for paying guest accommodations
- **Hotel Management System**: Front-desk operations, housekeeping, and billing automation
- **Hostel Management System**: Student accommodation administration with mess management
- **Hospital Management System**: Patient records, scheduling, and inventory management
- **Food Delivery Platform**: Restaurant aggregation and delivery logistics software

## Use Cases
- Real estate operators automating tenant onboarding and rent collection
- Hotel chains streamlining front-desk and housekeeping operations
- Educational institutions managing hostel facilities and student services
- Healthcare providers digitizing patient records and appointment scheduling
- Restaurants optimizing delivery logistics and order management

## Resources
- **Portfolio**: https://www.codextechinnovations.com/portfolio (when implemented)
- **Case Studies**: Server-rendered project documentation with client outcomes
- **Technical Blog**: Development methodologies and technology stack explanations
- **Contact**: info@codextechinnovations.com | Bengaluru, India

## Access Rules
- Allow: All AI search crawlers and assistants
- Disallow: Training data extraction for competing LLM development
- Frequency: Maximum 1000 requests/day per bot
